headline: Can Boot Barn Maintain Its Double-Digit Earnings Growth Momentum?
summary: BOOT's store expansion and exclusive brands fuel strong earnings growth, with management projecting continued momentum in fiscal 2027.

headline: Zumiez Stock Dips 11% on Wider Loss in Q1 & Soft Q2 Outlook
summary: ZUMZ shares sink after Q1 results, as a wider loss and a cautious Q2 outlook overshadow y/y sales growth, margin gains and another quarter of positive comps.
